name: Use of Expired File Descriptor
description: The product accesses or uses a file descriptor after it has been closed. Since closed file descriptors may be reused by the system, the code may inadvertently operate on a different file or device than intended, potentially causing data corruption or information disclosure.
detection_pattern: STORAGE[file_descriptor] node is closed via a TRANSFORM[close] operation, but a subsequent TRANSFORM or EGRESS node references the same STORAGE[file_descriptor] without a new TRANSFORM[open] re-acquiring it
